_comment: Loaded by harness/run.ts runAgent() via `claude --settings <this file>` (command-line precedence = highest). Sole purpose: blank ANTHROPIC_API_KEY so spawned headless agents fall back to the Max-plan claude.ai login instead of the global ~/.claude/settings.json env-block key (which is credit-starved). Tool permissions are NOT here — they live in .claude/settings.json (inherited by each worktree). Verified: `claude --settings '{"env":{"ANTHROPIC_API_KEY":""}}' -p ...` returns AUTHOK on the subscription.
